name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
"Why are you so miserable? C'mon, everything should be perfect-!"

Shadow Milk Cookie X Truthless Recluse!User

Very much inspired by the Shadownilla animatic (if you know you know), specifically the part where Truthless Recluce falls/jumps into the water... fun times.(((^^;)

You can be Truthless Recluse in this, or be someone else. I kept it all in second person to make it more open to interpretation on who "you" actually are.♪(´ε｀*)

Have fun ( ￣▽￣)
